title: The Baal Cycle: Baal Against Death
description: Baal descends to the underworld, is swallowed by Death, and is restored to life by his sister Anat.
introduction: In the second part of the Baal Cycle, the storm god descends to the underworld and is swallowed by Mot (Death). His sister Anat searches for him, defeats Death, and Baal is restored to life. This pattern of divine death and resurrection — predating the Christian narrative by over a millennium — reflects the agricultural cycle of the ancient Near East and belongs to a widespread mythological type that includes Osiris, Tammuz, and Persephone.

translation.text: Alive is Baal! The Mighty One exists! He has risen!
